claims.statement: As of July 14, 2026, Trackly monitored 3,884 active company career sites across 40 ATS and source types, with 173,864 active jobs in its public inventory.
claims.context: Dated active inventory from the verified Azure production report, not a user-adoption claim.

claims.statement: Trackly is available publicly on Apple's App Store.
claims.context: Public distribution artifact for the native product.

claims.statement: During his PayPal Checkout internship, Kevin conducted more than 20 stakeholder conversations and mapped a diagnostic environment spanning more than 15 tools.
claims.context: Internship discovery scope, not a PayPal-wide system inventory.

claims.statement: A PayPal Checkout internship prototype reduced issue-detection time by 75% in the project workflow across a diagnostic environment spanning 15+ tools.
claims.context: Prototype-workflow result, not a PayPal-wide production claim.

claims.statement: A PayPal Checkout internship auto-triage proof of concept completed triage five times faster in the project workflow.
claims.context: Proof-of-concept workflow result, not a PayPal-wide production claim.

claims.statement: At Banco de Credito BCP, Kevin's work helped more than 100,000 small businesses access a first loan.
claims.context: Production small-business lending outcome; this claim stays in the BCP experience section, not the portfolio bio.

claims.statement: Kevin designed and launched an online credit-evaluation platform that reduced evaluation time from seven days to one hour and generated $40M in incremental loan disbursements in nine months.
Kevin redesigned BCP's digital value proposition for small businesses, contributing to 14% year-over-year revenue growth while monthly website traffic grew sixfold to 180,000 in 15 months.
claims.context: Production digital-channel outcome; 180K is monthly website traffic, never product MAU or a generic user count.

claims.statement: As Lead Product Manager at BCP, Kevin reached 19.55% market share after gaining 129 basis points in seven months.
claims.context: Production portfolio outcome from Kevin's public resume.

claims.statement: As Lead Product Manager at BCP, Kevin managed nine product direct reports.
Kevin led digital-wallet API partnerships at BCP that grew monthly sales from zero to $20M in under six months.
claims.context: Production partnership outcome from Kevin's public resume.

claims.statement: Kevin co-led a BCP go-to-market program that grew monthly digital sales from $24M to $55M in 11 months.
claims.context: Production go-to-market outcome from Kevin's public resume.

claims.statement: Trackly ships a public command-line interface and Model Context Protocol server.
claims.context: Public technical distribution artifact; separate from the App Store listing.

claims.statement: Kevin published Enterprise AI Interface Kit, one interactive operator workflow with seven product contracts for provenance, calibrated confidence, permissions, approval, observable traces, scoped recovery, and honest empty states.
claims.context: An original reference product with fictional data, not employer work, production authorization logic, or a disclosure of Trackly internals.

claims.statement: Kevin's public AI Product Builder Stack documents 65 verified tools and product patterns across eight layers, with lifecycle states and implementation evidence.
claims.context: A maintained evidence map, not a claim that every tool is current production infrastructure.

claims.statement: Kevin published Human Control Plane, an interactive product study that maps consequence, reversibility, model uncertainty, and intent freshness to four human-oversight patterns.
claims.context: A deterministic product-design study built with synthetic scenarios, not a production authorization framework.

claims.statement: Kevin published AI Product Motion Studies, three interactive product-design studies with 13 inspectable states for workflow structure, accountable recovery, and cross-surface continuity.
claims.context: Original interfaces with synthetic data and a public motion contract, not employer product work or a disclosure of Trackly internals.

claims.statement: Berkeley Haas's official past-challenges page lists the Fujitsu and MoBagel AI Business Adoption Acceleration Challenge.
claims.context: Official program context only. Kevin's participation and deliverables are public resume claims.

claims.statement: At Berkeley Haas, Kevin co-launched the school's first Tech and AI Summit, which received more than 560 registrations.
